scenarios.description: appendChild throws IllegalArgumentException when child is null
appendChild adds a first child to empty childNodes
scenarios.precondition: Element el = new Element("div"); Node child = new Element("span");
scenarios.expectedResult: el.childNodeSize() == 1 and el.childNode(0) == child and child.parent() == el and child.siblingIndex == 0
pseudocode: Element el = new Element("div"); Node child = new Element("span");
assert result == el; assert el.childNodeSize() == 1; assert el.childNode(0) == child; assert child.parent() == el; assert child.siblingIndex == 0;

scenarios.description: appendChild adds a second child to non-empty childNodes and updates siblingIndex
scenarios.precondition: Element el = new Element("div"); Node first = new Element("a"); el.appendChild(first); Node second = new Element("b");
scenarios.expectedResult: el.childNodeSize() == 2 and el.childNode(1) == second and second.parent() == el and second.siblingIndex == 1 and first.siblingIndex == 0
pseudocode: Element el = new Element("div"); Node first = new Element("a"); el.appendChild(first); Node second = new Element("b");
assert el.childNodeSize() == 2; assert el.childNode(1) == second; assert second.parent() == el; assert second.siblingIndex == 1; assert first.siblingIndex == 0;
